title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. irriguum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. irriguum, also known as the Alpine Hawk's Beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. irriguum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the urinary system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and digestive issues.
